business_term: Hospital Length of Stay (LOS) | The total duration a patient stays in the hospital during a single admission, typically measured in days or hours. | Calculated as dischtime minus admittime from the admissions table. | Hospital_LOS_Days = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (dischtime - admittime))/86400

ICU Length of Stay | The total duration a patient spends in a single ICU treatment episode; a patient may have multiple ICU stays (stay_id) within one hospital admission (hadm_id). | Calculated as outtime minus intime from the icustays table. | ICU_LOS_Hours = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (outtime - intime))/3600

In-hospital Mortality | A binary indicator determining whether a patient died during the current hospital admission. | Evaluated by checking if discharge_location in the admissions table contains or equals 'died'. | In_Hospital_Death_Flag = CASE WHEN discharge_location ILIKE '%died%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

30-Day Readmission Rate | A healthcare quality metric measuring whether a patient is readmitted within 30 days after discharge for any reason. | For the same subject_id, check if the time difference between current dischtime and next admittime is ≤ 30 days. | Use LEAD(admittime) OVER (PARTITION BY subject_id ORDER BY admittime) to compute inter-admission intervals.

Total Cost per Admission | The aggregate sum of all charges incurred during a single hospital admission (hadm_id), including labs, medications, and procedures. | Group the cost table by hadm_id and compute SUM(cost). | Total_Admission_Cost = SUM(cost.cost) GROUP BY cost.hadm_id

Diagnosis Count per Admission (Comorbidity Index) | A metric measuring clinical complexity by counting distinct ICD diagnosis codes assigned during a single admission. | Group diagnoses_icd by hadm_id and compute COUNT(DISTINCT icd_code). | Comorbidity_Count = COUNT(DISTINCT diagnoses_icd.icd_code) GROUP BY hadm_id

Net Fluid Balance | A critical ICU metric representing the difference between total fluid intake and total fluid output over a specified period. | SUM(inputevents.totalamount) minus SUM(outputevents.value) for a given stay_id or time window. | Net_Fluid_Balance = SUM(inputevents.totalamount) - SUM(outputevents.value) (joined via stay_id)

Positive Culture Rate | The proportion of microbiology tests that successfully identify a pathogenic organism among all cultures performed. | Count records where org_name IS NOT NULL divided by total record count in microbiologyevents. | Positive_Culture_Rate = COUNT(CASE WHEN org_name IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)

Prescription Duration | The duration for which a specific medication is continuously administered to a patient. | Calculated as stoptime minus starttime from the prescriptions table. | Prescription_Duration_Hours = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (stoptime - starttime))/3600

Elderly Cohort Definition / Age Grouping | Patients are dynamically grouped into age categories for analytics; 'elderly' typically refers to age ≥ 65. (Note: In MIMIC-IV, ages >89 are de-identified as 91 or 300 and should be treated as elderly.) | Based on the age field in admissions, define Elderly as age >= 65. | Is_Elderly = CASE WHEN age >= 65 THEN 'Elderly' ELSE 'Non-Elderly' END

Hospital-Acquired Infection (HAI) | Infection not present at admission but developed during hospitalization (typically >48 hours after admission); a core hospital infection control quality metric. | Join admissions and microbiologyevents; filter for positive cultures (org_name IS NOT NULL) where charttime > admittime + 48 hours. | WHERE microbiologyevents.org_name != '' AND microbiologyevents.charttime > (admissions.admittime + INTERVAL '48 hours')

ICU Bounce-back Rate | Patient discharged from ICU to general ward but readmitted to ICU during the same hospitalization due to clinical deterioration, indicating premature discharge or inadequate assessment. | In icustays table, group by hadm_id and count distinct stay_id; patients with >=2 stay_id within same hadm_id are bounce-back cases. | HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT stay_id) > 1 GROUP BY hadm_id

Frequent Flyers / Super-Utilizers | Patients who frequently consume healthcare resources, typically defined as having >=3 emergency or unplanned admissions within the past 365 days. | Use window function LEAD() to order admittime by subject_id; check if time difference between 1st and 3rd admission <= 365 days. | LEAD(admittime, 2) OVER(PARTITION BY subject_id ORDER BY admittime) - admittime <= INTERVAL '365 days'

ED Boarding Time / Time to ICU | Time difference between hospital admission registration and actual ICU bed assignment for emergency patients; key metric for bed turnover efficiency and ED congestion. | Join admissions and icustays; calculate MIN(icustays.intime) minus admissions.admittime for first ICU admission during hospitalization. | EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MIN(icustays.intime) - admissions.admittime))/3600

Polypharmacy Risk / Concurrent Medications | Risk indicator for drug interactions in elderly patients, defined as simultaneous use of >=5 different medications at the same time point or same day. | Simplified logic: group prescriptions by hadm_id and DATE(starttime), count DISTINCT drug >=5. | COUNT(DISTINCT drug) >= 5 GROUP BY subject_id, hadm_id, DATE(starttime)

End-of-Life Care Intensity | Ethical and economic metric examining resource allocation at end of life; defined as whether patient received ICU admission or high-cost interventions within 14 days before death. | Using patients.dod and icustays.intime, identify patients where dod IS NOT NULL AND dod - intime <= 14 days. | WHERE patients.dod IS NOT NULL AND patients.dod - icustays.intime <= INTERVAL '14 days'

Sepsis Protocol Proxy: Lactate Turnaround Time | Clinical requirement for lactate monitoring in sepsis patients; metric measures number of lactate tests within first 24 hours of ICU admission. | Join icustays, labevents, d_labitems; filter label = 'lactate', count tests where charttime BETWEEN intime AND intime + 24 hours. | COUNT(labevents.itemid) >= 2 WHERE charttime <= intime + INTERVAL '24 hours'

Daily Ward/ICU Census | Core hospital operations report showing number of patients physically present in a unit on a specific date. | Overlapping interval check: Target_Date must satisfy Target_Date >= transfers.intime AND (Target_Date <= transfers.outtime OR transfers.outtime IS NULL). | WHERE '2100-12-25' BETWEEN DATE(intime) AND COALESCE(DATE(outtime), CURRENT_DATE)

Daily Cost Intensity | Identifies high-cost phases; defined as total admission cost divided by total length of stay (or ICU days) to measure daily expenditure intensity. | Divide aggregated total admission cost (SUM(cost.cost)) by calculated total hospital days (EXTRACT(DAY FROM dischtime - admittime) + 1). | SUM(cost.cost) / GREATEST(1, EXTRACT(DAY FROM dischtime - admittime))

Intervention Turnaround Time | Clinical execution metric measuring time from positive microbiology report (or critical value) to prescription initiation (e.g., antibiotics). | Join microbiologyevents and prescriptions by hadm_id; calculate minimum time difference where prescriptions.starttime > microbiologyevents.charttime. | MIN(prescriptions.starttime - microbiologyevents.charttime) with condition starttime > charttime
